exampleSentencesTranslated: She needs one more week for the completion of this project.
The completion of his new house ended last week.
I feel very happy to see the completion of the final product.
exampleSentences: Chị cần thêm một tuần nữa để hoàn thiện dự án này.
Quá trình hoàn thiện ngôi nhà mới của anh đã kết thúc tuần trước.
Em cảm thấy rất vui khi thấy sự hoàn thiện của sản phẩm cuối cùng.

example.es: Estoy tratando de perfeccionar mis habilidades.
example.en: I am trying to perfect my skills.
example.vi: Tôi đang cố gắng hoàn thiện kỹ năng của mình.

definitions.en: To make something complete or perfect.
definitions.es: Hacer que algo esté completo o perfecto.
definitions.vi: Làm cho một cái gì đó hoàn chỉnh hoặc hoàn hảo.

notes:
Hoàn thiện usually means to complete something and make it fully finished. It often has the idea of making it better or more perfect, not just stopping at “done.”

It’s a verb, used with projects, products, systems, skills, or even yourself.  

It’s close to hoàn thành (finish), but hoàn thiện focuses more on polishing and improving the final quality. It’s also related to cải thiện (improve), but hoàn thiện suggests bringing something to its final, complete state.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần ___ dự án này.

translation.en: We need to complete this project.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần ___ dự án này.

translation.en: We need to complete this project.

notes_md:
**Hoàn thiện** usually means *to complete* something and make it fully finished. It often has the idea of making it better or more perfect, not just stopping at “done.”

It’s a **verb**, used with projects, products, systems, skills, or even yourself.  

It’s close to **hoàn thành** (finish), but *hoàn thiện* focuses more on polishing and improving the final quality. It’s also related to **cải thiện** (improve), but *hoàn thiện* suggests bringing something to its final, complete state.
